command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user e6qeZQ9RRN5ZtzL.187ccab2ac56 --database dAVBxpSeSZ4jhwmMBJquFo --execute 
SET @scoop_duke_id = (SELECT id FROM partners WHERE businessName = 'Scoop Duke DFW' LIMIT 1);
SET @green_thumb_id = (SELECT id FROM partners WHERE businessName = 'Green Thumb Lawn Care' LIMIT 1);

-- Seed 2 jobs logged by Scoop Duke
INSERT INTO jobs (partnerId, loggedByUserId, serviceAddress, serviceAddressLat, serviceAddressLng, customerName, notes, status, createdAt)
VALUES
  (@scoop_duke_id, 1, '3301 Lovers Ln, Dallas, TX 75225', 32.8601, -96.8103, 'Tom Whitfield', 'Completed yard cleanup. Grass overgrown 6+ inches. Homeowner mentioned needing lawn service.', 'opportunities_sent', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 DAY)),
  (@scoop_duke_id, 1, '5519 Gaston Ave, Dallas, TX 75214', 32.7845, -96.7489, 'Lisa Nguyen', 'Routine service done. Noticed broken fence panel on east side and overgrown hedges.', 'opportunities_sent', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 20 DAY));

-- Outbound referrals Scoop Duke sent to Green Thumb
INSERT INTO opportunities (jobId, sourcePartnerId, receivingPartnerId, opportunityType, opportunityCategory, description, aiConfidence, status, estimatedJobValue, actualJobValue, referralCommissionAmount, sentAt, acceptedAt, jobClosedAt, createdAt)
VALUES
  ((SELECT id FROM jobs WHERE serviceAddress = '3301 Lovers Ln, Dallas, TX 75225' LIMIT 1), @scoop_duke_id, @green_thumb_id, 'lawn_mowing', 'Outdoor & Lawn', 'Grass overgrown 6+ inches across full yard. Homeowner confirmed no current lawn service. Excellent recurring opportunity.', 0.96, 'converted', 280.00, 265.00, 13.25, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 11 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 11 DAY)),
  ((SELECT id FROM jobs WHERE serviceAddress = '5519 Gaston Ave, Dallas, TX 75214' LIMIT 1), @scoop_duke_id, @green_thumb_id, 'lawn_mowing', 'Outdoor & Lawn', 'Overgrown hedges and lawn needing full trim. Broken fence panel also spotted — may need fencing referral too.', 0.89, 'accepted', 195.00, NULL, NULL, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 19 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 DAY), NULL, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 19 DAY));

-- Commission record for the converted job
INSERT INTO commissions (opportunityId, payingPartnerId, receivingPartnerId, commissionType, amount, jobValue, feeRate, description, paid, createdAt)
VALUES
  ((SELECT id FROM opportunities WHERE opportunityType = 'lawn_mowing' AND status = 'converted' LIMIT 1), @green_thumb_id, @scoop_duke_id, 'referral_commission', 13.25, 265.00, 0.0500, 'Referral commission: Scoop Duke → Green Thumb Lawn Care, 3301 Lovers Ln', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY));
logs: ERROR 1364 (HY000) at line 18: Field 'partnerId' doesn't have a default value
